title: end portal parallax
description: makes end portals and gateways look beautiful the way they used to
body:
# ![end portal parallax title image, it look simple, mysterious, and colorful](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94981fea2c90b3c6a333d6b3d9613901e5c89d4a.png)

### From mc 1.11+ the end portal was changed to be a screenspace texture.
### This mod changes it to the beautiful parallax visuals it had before.
observe:
<iframe width="872" height="490" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0R3CrYE3RkA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### End gateways are also changed similarly, and both portals and gateways are visible from all sides.

- [curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/end-portal-parallax)
